creator: the_mix_room@hotmail.com
text:
Samba4 4.0.5 has been released. Builds fine on my machine with some minor changes to the port.

Fix: 

Remove 
files/patch-lib__socket__interfaces.c
files/patch-nsswitch__wscript_build
files/patch-source4__lib__cmdline__wscript_build
files/patch-source4__libcli__resolve__dns_ex.c


I get:

SHA256 (samba-4.0.5) = c1175079d5724441e558982246128ee0578bb0b300e335e91b82ed97b03733f1
SIZE (samba-4.0.5) = 23958079
